Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

who thinks that Tulsiananda Prabhus questions are polluting the site?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-08-24 · 9 answers
Because there is a friendly mood in this site and maybe this kind of questions will make this degrade...
user [38] · 2007-08-24
Not necessarily. Its just enough to ignore such input and the person sooner or later understands. Hed certainly find a better response on other sites.
user [152] · 2007-08-24
I think it is excellent to have contributions from someone like Tulsiananda Prabhu, otherwise being conditioned souls we might make the mistake (like zonal guru system) of thinking that we have the right system when it could be quite wrong. So it is good to get both sides and let the devotees make their up their own mind.
user [2] · 2007-08-24
we can learn a lot from mistakes. If we allow ourselves and others to commit them.
user [33] · 2007-08-24
[quote][cite] shina:[/cite]Because there is a friendly mood in this site and maybe this kind of questions will make this degrade...[/quote]

No
user [153] · 2007-08-24
how can "the Q & A resource for all devotees" challenge the questions of a devotee
who asks them? fear comes from ignorance.
user [140] · 2007-08-24
remember my freinds,the catagorie is SOCIAL : Everything related to social interactions, (ISKCON issues go here too).
can you say " everything " ?
user [40] · 2007-08-24
he certainly is a provocateur
user [1] · 2007-08-25
Please use this forum as a humble question and answer facility (pariprashnena). If we see someone using the forum as a way to advance or impose own agenda on others, we will act. Same goes for personal evaluations that cover no purpose.
Thank you.
user [140] · 2007-08-25
Hari Bol Shina !

My question : " Is it ok for Iskcon GBC members to promote material culture ? " remains availble for disccusion.

Score: Tulsianada das 1 - Shina 0

..say listen Prabhu,you can always log on to the sqeaky-clean,sanitized,disenfected and 100% censored Dandavats site,
I am sure they will be happy to discuss the latest coconut burfi recipies with you.
